DualStream

DualStream

Maker

📌

Hey Product Hunt! 👋 MD here, founder of DualStream, with my co-founder John (Tangent on Twitch where he's been Partner for over 13 years). Quick story on how this got built, because the origin actually matters: [...] DualStream is one studio that streams to your Desktop and Mobile audiences at the same time - same sources, arranged for each scene, live everywhere in one click. The DualStream Relay - one upload from your PC, live on every platform from our servers. And if your connection drops mid-broadcast, Relay keeps every platform live on your standby screen and picks back up the moment you reconnect. Native Alerts, Per-Source audio control, VTuber support, instant replay clips (horizontal and vertical), cinema grade effects, pop-out multi-platform chat and so much more is all built in.

results.title: About DualStream — The streaming studio for every screen.
results.content:
DualStream

FeaturesRelayPricingAboutEngineBlog
Sign Up

# AboutDualStream

Built for streamers. By streamers.

## Our Story

DualStream is the streaming studio for going live everywhere — Twitch, YouTube, Kick, and any RTMP destination. Desktop and mobile, from one scene, in one click. Beautifully powerful. Astonishingly easy.

We were tired of choosing between desktop and mobile viewers. Tired of unstable streaming stacks held together by plugins. Tired of watching half our potential audience scroll past because we picked the wrong aspect ratio.

So in 2025, we built DualStream. Not because we're heroes (though we'll accept the title), but because streaming to everyone shouldn't require a computer science degree and 15 plugins. [...] Turns out, when you build something you actually need, other people need it too. Who knew?

## Why now?

Vertical isn't a sub-format anymore — it's where new audiences live. TikTok, Reels, Shorts, and vertical live on YouTube now drive most of the discovery on the open internet. The audience has already moved.

Meanwhile, the streaming software the world uses was designed when desktop was the only screen that mattered. Bolting a second format onto a single-format engine is a multi-year rebuild — and with millions of broadcasters depending on them, legacy tools can't rebuild the plane mid-flight.

That's the gap we built DualStream to close: native dual-format from day one, not bolted on. Because every month you stream in a single format, the audience you're missing compounds. [...] ### Ryan Ippolito

Chief Financial Officer

30 years scaling high-growth companies. Helped raise $250M+ in capital and led $300M+ in M&A. Formerly CFO at Terumo Neuro (~$1B); leadership roles at Johnson & Johnson and Convatec.

> “I've been streaming since before vertical was even a thing, and every 'multi-format' tool I've tried bolted it on as an afterthought. DualStream is the first one that feels like it was built for the way I actually stream now.”

— @Tangent, Co-Founder & CGO · twitch.tv/tangent

## Our Mission

Make professional streaming tools accessible to everyone. No PhD required.

Simple

No complicated setup. Just stream.

Fast

New features every 2 weeks. Your input shapes what we build next.

Dual-Format

Stream desktop and mobile simultaneously.

## Get in Touch
